content:text:1:54.html: Help Us Make Christmas Magic this year!

content:text:2:23.name: Heading
content:text:2:23.html: Christmas is right around the corner and we need your help to bring joy to local children in need. This holiday season, more than 8,000 children are registered for our Angel Tree program. When you adopt an Angel, you will receive a gift tag with that child's Christmas wish list including their favorite toys, clothing sizes, and favorite colors.

content:textarea:14:78.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:14:78.html: You may receive a message that all angels are adopted. However, we often have "Forgotten Angels"--children who were selected but for whom no gifts are ultimately returned. When this happens, we rely on generous community donations of toys and clothing to ensure every child is blessed on Christmas morning.

content:textarea:35:62.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:35:62.html: Please drop off your gifts by December 8. We will accept gifts on December 13, but this date is reserved only for last-minute shoppers.

content:textarea:36:33.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:36:33.html: To ensure we can fulfill the wish lists of our record number of angels and prepare for distribution the week before Christmas, we kindly ask that all gifts be returned by December 8.
